Type Organism Microbial Alzheimer's Data Sets Center
Mime-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=us-ascii
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
X-From: "Alzheimer's Association" <alz.org@enron.com>
X-To: 
X-cc: 
X-bcc: 
X-Folder: \kate symes 6-27-02\Notes Folders\Discussion threads
X-Origin: SYMES-K
X-FileName: kate symes 6-27-02.nsf

The Alzheimer's Association is pleased to announce the launch of the new 
Alzheimer's Microbial Data Center. The Center will provide the public with 
information about the causes and treatments of Alzheimer's disease, as well as 
information about the impact of environmental factors on the disease. 

The Center will be a resource for researchers, health professionals, and the public. It will provide 
information about the disease, as well as information about environmental 
risk factors that may be associated with the disease. 

The Center will be a resource for researchers, health professionals, and the public.

John has been with Enron for over 15 years and has been responsible for 
the development of Enron's wholesale business.  John will be responsible for 
the overall management of Enron's wholesale business.  John will report to 
Jeff Skilling.  John will report to me.  

I would like to thank all of you for your continued support of Enron.  

Sincerely,
Jeff
